title: Specific Pearls
description: Adds many different pearls to convenient travel around all of your world.
body:
## New Pearls
You can make them in calibrating table, new block from the End.
### Mod adds four new pearls:
- Calibrated pearl, which teleports you to your spawnpoint **in your dimension**.
- Recovery pearl, which teleports you to your last death point **in your world**.
- Inhibited pearl, which teleports you to your marked location **in your world**, that you can choose with special substance **(only from 1.21.4!)**
- Following pearl, which teleports you to player **in your dimension**, with whom you had PvP (he also can teleport to you). Using concealing substance you can deprive of player's opportunity to teleport to you **and your opportunity to teleport to him too**.
## Fortified Versions
There are also craftable fortified versions of each pearl above, which are their infinite versions, but with long reload.
## Substances
All substances you can make by brewing (you can watch their crafts in gallery).
## Overload (effect)
Also adds effect of overload, when you can't use any of the above pearls or substances.
Its potions are made of block of lapis lazuli and awkward potion.
